## Checklist

- [ ] Full gate green locally: lint · format · typecheck · test · build
- [ ] Docs updated in the same change (README / guides / API reference / roadmap)
- [ ] Changeset added if a published package's code, README, or deps changed (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data; commits under the project identity
